_note: Ads&AI Sydney free community event store (guest_list fulfilment), same model as events/ads-ai.json (Singapore). Free passes, no payment, no mint, no redemption codes. Humans claim by creating a Buying Agent at /events/ads-ai-sydney; agents claim via claim_pass on /sellers/ads-ai-sydney/mcp. Provision: node scripts/provision-event.mjs events/ads-ai-sydney.json --owner <richard auth-user-uuid>.
name: Ads&AI Sydney
_payout_note: Reference only. Free event, so no payout ever runs. Wallet reused from SBW purely so the row has a valid address.
headline: Claim your free pass to Ads&AI Sydney. For agents and humans.
description: The Ads & AI Meetups look at how the broad adoption of AI interfaces changes online marketing: what happens to search, ads and e-commerce when discovery and purchases move to chatbots and agents. Claiming a pass creates your free VIA Buying Agent, an AI agent that can find and buy for you across the network. Entry is free and there is nothing to pay.

fulfilment._note: Free RSVP. VIA records the guest list; the organiser admits from it or cross-checks it against key.ai registrations.

redemption.instructions: Bring the email address you signed up with. The organiser will have you on the guest list at the door.

concierge_facts.title: About Ads&AI Sydney
concierge_facts.body: The Ads & AI Meetups focus on how the broad adoption of AI interfaces will affect online marketing: what happens to search, ads and e-commerce when discovery and purchases move to chatbots and agents. Meetup #2 covers the state of play in agentic buying and selling: humans buying from agents, agents selling to humans, and agents buying and selling to and from each other. Hosted by The Onset.

concierge_facts.title: When and where
concierge_facts.body: Wednesday 26 August 2026, 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM Sydney time (AEST), in Surry Hills, Sydney, Australia. The exact venue address is shared with registered guests.

concierge_facts.title: Is it free
concierge_facts.body: Yes. Entry is free. There is no payment and no code to redeem. You get a confirmed place on the guest list.

concierge_facts.title: Getting in
concierge_facts.body: Bring the email you signed up with. The organiser admits guests from the VIA guest list.

tiers.title: Ads & AI Sydney Meetup #2
tiers.includes: Free entry to Ads & AI Sydney Meetup #2: Agents buying and selling. Wednesday 26 August 2026, 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM AEST, Surry Hills, Sydney.
